country|every_country_strategic_region|Iterate through all strategic regions containing states owned by the scoped country   every_country_strategic_region
none|every_decentralized_country|Iterate through all countries that are decentralized   every_decentralized_country
country|every_diplomatic_catalyst|Iterate through all diplomatic catalysts in the recent memory of a country   every_diplomatic_catalyst
none|every_diplomatic_play|Iterate through all diplomatic plays globally   every_diplomatic_play
country|every_diplomatically_relevant_country|Iterate through all diplomatically relevant countries of a country scope   every_diplomatically_relevant_country
country|every_direct_subject|Any country directly below current in hierarchy   every_direct_subject
country|every_enemy_in_diplo_play|Iterate through all enemies of scope country in all diplomatic plays (includes wars)   every_enemy_in_diplo_play
country|every_enemy_in_war|Iterate through all enemies of scope country in all wars   every_enemy_in_war
country,state,state_region,strategic_region|every_harvest_condition|Iterate through all harvest conditions affecting a state, state region, strategic region, or country   every_harvest_condition
none|every_in_global_list|Iterate through all items in global list.
country|every_in_hierarchy|Any country in current hierarchy, including current   every_in_hierarchy
none|every_in_list|Iterate through all items in list.
none|every_in_local_list|Iterate through all items in local list.
political_movement|every_influenced_interest_group|Iterate through all interest groups influenced by a political movement   every_influenced_interest_group
country|every_interest_group|Iterate through all interest groups in a country   every_interest_group
country|every_law|Iterate through all laws in a country   every_law
political_lobby|every_lobby_member|Iterate through all interest group members of a lobby   every_lobby_member
none|every_market|Iterate through all markets globally   every_market
market|every_market_goods|Iterate through all active (market) goods in a market   every_market_goods
party|every_member|Iterate through all interest group members of a party   every_member
country,front,hq|every_military_formation|Iterate through all military formations currently present at input scope   Supported scopes: country, front, hq   every_military_formation
country,state,state_region,strategic_region|every_neighbouring_state|Iterate through all states neighbouring a state region   every_neighbouring_state
country|every_overlord_or_above|Any country above current in hierarchy   every_overlord_or_above
company|every_owned_country|Iterate through all countries owned by the scoped company   every_owned_country
diplomatic_pact|every_participant|Any of two participants of the diplomatic pact in a scope   every_participant
country,interest_group|every_political_lobby|Iterate through all political lobbies in a country or interest group   every_political_lobby
country|every_political_movement|Iterate through all political movements in a country   every_political_movement
law|every_possible_amendment_type|Iterate through amendment types that could be added to the scoped law   every_possible_amendment_type
country|every_potential_party|Iterate through all potential political parties in a country   every_potential_party
none|every_power_bloc|Iterate through all power blocs   every_power_bloc
power_bloc|every_power_bloc_member|Iterate through all members of the scoped power bloc including the leader   every_power_bloc_member
interest_group|every_preferred_law|Iterate through all active and possible laws in an interest group's country, ordered by how much they prefer that law   every_preferred_law

country|every_rival_country|Any country that is being rivaled by the country in a scope   every_rival_country
country|every_rivaling_country|Any country that is rivaling the country in a scope   every_rivaling_country
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|every_scope_admiral|Iterate through all admirals in a: country, interestgroup, or military formation   every_scope_admiral
country|every_scope_ally|Iterate through all allies to a: country   every_scope_ally
law|every_scope_amendment|Iterate through amendments of the scoped law   every_scope_amendment
country,front,hq|every_scope_army|Iterate through all armies currently present at input scope   Supported scopes: country, front, hq   every_scope_army
treaty|every_scope_article|Iterate through articles of the scoped treaty   every_scope_article
treaty_options,treaty|every_scope_article_option|Iterate through article_options of the scoped treaty or treaty_options   every_scope_article_option
country,state|every_scope_building|Iterate through all buildings in a: state, country   every_scope_building
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|every_scope_character|Iterate through all characters in a: country, interestgroup, or front   every_scope_character
market,state_region,strategic_region|every_scope_country|Iterate through all countries with a presence in the supported scope (currently: market, strategic region)   every_scope_country
country,state|every_scope_culture|Iterate through all cultures in the scope   every_scope_culture
country|every_scope_diplomatic_pact|Any diplomatic pact of the country in a scope   every_scope_diplomatic_pact
country,hq|every_scope_fleet|Iterate through all fleets currently present at input scope   Supported scopes: country, hq   every_scope_fleet
war|every_scope_front|Iterate through all Fronts related to the scoped War   every_scope_front
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|every_scope_general|Iterate through all generals in a: country, interestgroup, front, or military formation   every_scope_general
country|every_scope_held_interest_marker|Iterate through all interest markers held by a country   every_scope_held_interest_marker
country,culture|every_scope_homeland_state|Iterate through all states that are a homeland for the scoped culture, or a homeland of any primary culture of the scoped country   every_scope_hom...
diplomatic_play|every_scope_initiator_ally|Iterate through all allies to an initiator in a: diplomatic play   every_scope_initiator_ally
country,state_region,strategic_region|every_scope_interest_marker|Iterate through all interest markers in a: country, strategic region, state region   every_scope_interest_marker
journal_entry|every_scope_je_involved|Iterate through all involved in a journal entry   every_scope_je_involved
diplomatic_play|every_scope_play_involved|Iterate through all involved in a: diplomatic play   every_scope_play_involved
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|every_scope_politician|Iterate through all politicians in a: country or interestgroup   every_scope_politician
country,culture,interest_group,state|every_scope_pop|Iterate through all pops in a: country, state, interest group, culture   every_scope_pop
company|every_scope_regional_hqs|Iterate through regional HQs of the scoped company   every_scope_regional_hqs
country,military_formation|every_scope_ship|Iterate through all ships in a country or military formation   every_scope_ship
country,front,state_region,strait,strategic_region,theater|every_scope_state|Iterate through all states including provinces from a: country, state_region, theater, front, or strait   every_scope_state
country,state|every_scope_strait|Iterate through all straits with a land endpoint in the scoped state or country   every_scope_strait
diplomatic_play|every_scope_target_ally|Iterate through all allies to a target in a: diplomatic play   every_scope_target_ally
country|every_scope_theater|Iterate through all theaters in a: country   every_scope_theater
country|every_scope_treaty|Iterate through in force treaties binding the scoped country   every_scope_treaty
country|every_scope_violate_sovereignty_interested_parties|Iterate through all countries that would be interested if country in scope has their sovereignty violated   every_scope_violate_sovereignty_interes...
country|every_scope_violate_sovereignty_wars|Iterate through all relevant wars if target country had their sovereignty violated by scoped country   every_scope_violate_sovereignty_wars
country|every_scope_war|Iterate through all wars related to the scope   every_scope_war
state|every_sea_node_adjacent_state|Iterate through all states that share a sea node with a state   every_sea_node_adjacent_state
none|every_state|Iterate through all states globally   every_state

none|every_strategic_region_in_zanj_old|army_projection_comparison
country|every_subject_of_subject|Any country below direct subjects in hierarchy   every_subject_of_subject
country|every_subject_or_below|Any country below current in hierarchy   every_subject_or_below
political_movement|every_supporting_character|Iterate through all characters that support the scoped political movement   every_supporting_character
none|every_treaty|Iterate through treaties (both in force and drafts)   every_treaty
country|every_valid_mass_migration_culture|Lists for cultures in the scoped country that are valid for mass migration   every_valid_mass_migration_culture
war|every_war_participant|Iterate through all participants in a war   every_war_participant
none|execute_event_option|Execute effects of the specified event option in the specified event   execute_event_option
character|exile_character|Exile a character to the exile pool
state_region|finish_harvest_condition|Finish a harvest condition of type in the scoped state region   finish_harvest_condition
interest_group|finish_negotiation|Finishes the negotiation that has started for an interest group:
state|force_resource_depletion|Forces a resource depletion in state
state|force_resource_discovery|Forces a resource discovery in state
character|free_character_from_void|Frees a character from the void, if set to no character is deleted instead
military_formation|fully_mobilize_army|Fully mobilizes scope army
none|hidden_effect|Enclosed effects are not shown in tooltips   hidden_effect
none|if|Executes enclosed effects if limit criteria are met   if
interest_group|improve_stance|Improves the stance of an IG on the currently enacting law by the given number of steps:
country|increase_autonomy|Change a country's subject type to a more autonomus one
country|join_power_bloc|Scoped country joins the power bloc of the target scoped country
interest_group|join_revolution|Adds interest group to ongoing revolution
war|join_war|Makes target join a scoped war in a specific side.
character|kill_character|Kill a character
ship|kill_crew|Kills a given amount of a ship's crew
ship|kill_crew_percent|Kills a given percentage of a ship's crew
country|kill_population|Kills a number of individuals in the population in the scoped country.
state|kill_population_in_state|Kills a number of individuals in the population in the scoped state.
country|kill_population_percent|Kills a percentage of the population in the scoped country.
state|kill_population_percent_in_state|Kills a percentage of the population in the scoped state.
ship|kill_ship|Destroys the scoped ship
country,state|liberate_slaves|Frees all slaves in the country/state
country|liberate_slaves_in_incorporated_states|Frees all slaves in the country's incorporated states
country|liberate_slaves_in_unincorporated_states|Frees all slaves in the country's unincorporated states
country|make_independent|Makes a country independent.
military_formation|mobilize_army|Mobilizes scope army
pop|move_partial_pop|Moves the scoped pop to the specified state (they become unemployed)
pop|move_pop|Moves the scoped pop in its entirety to the specified state (they become unemployed)
country|ordered_active_law|Iterate through all active laws in a country   ordered_active_law
country|ordered_active_party|Iterate through all active political parties in a country   ordered_active_party
none|ordered_character|Iterate through all characters globally   ordered_character
none|ordered_character_in_exile_pool|Iterate through characters in the exile pool   ordered_character_in_exile_pool
none|ordered_character_in_void|Iterate through characters in the void   ordered_character_in_void
character|ordered_character_role|Iterate through all roles of the scoped character   ordered_character_role
country|ordered_civil_war|Iterate through all civil wars related to the scoped country   ordered_civil_war
country|ordered_cobelligerent_in_diplo_play|Iterate through all co-belligerents of scope country in all diplomatic plays (includes wars)   ordered_cobelligerent_in_diplo_play
country|ordered_cobelligerent_in_war|Iterate through all co-belligerents of scope country in all wars   ordered_cobelligerent_in_war
battle,building,front,hq,military_formation|ordered_combat_unit|Iterate through all combat units of input scope   Supported scopes: building, military formation, front, battle   ordered_combat_unit
country|ordered_company|Iterate through all companies in a country   ordered_company
none|ordered_country|Iterate through all countries globally   ordered_country
none|ordered_country_in_afghanistan|power_bloc_mandate_progress_per_unrecognized_regional_power_member
none|ordered_country_in_africa|power_bloc_mandate_progress_per_unrecognized_major_power_member

country|ordered_direct_subject|Any country directly below current in hierarchy   ordered_direct_subject

country|ordered_enemy_in_war|Iterate through all enemies of scope country in all wars   ordered_enemy_in_war

country|ordered_rival_country|Any country that is being rivaled by the country in a scope   ordered_rival_country
country|ordered_rivaling_country|Any country that is rivaling the country in a scope   ordered_rivaling_country
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|ordered_scope_admiral|Iterate through all admirals in a: country, interestgroup, or military formation   ordered_scope_admiral
country|ordered_scope_ally|Iterate through all allies to a: country   ordered_scope_ally
law|ordered_scope_amendment|Iterate through amendments of the scoped law   ordered_scope_amendment
country,front,hq|ordered_scope_army|Iterate through all armies currently present at input scope   Supported scopes: country, front, hq   ordered_scope_army
treaty|ordered_scope_article|Iterate through articles of the scoped treaty   ordered_scope_article
treaty_options,treaty|ordered_scope_article_option|Iterate through article_options of the scoped treaty or treaty_options   ordered_scope_article_option
country,state|ordered_scope_building|Iterate through all buildings in a: state, country   ordered_scope_building
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|ordered_scope_character|Iterate through all characters in a: country, interestgroup, or front   ordered_scope_character
market,state_region,strategic_region|ordered_scope_country|Iterate through all countries with a presence in the supported scope (currently: market, strategic region)   ordered_scope_country
country,state|ordered_scope_culture|Iterate through all cultures in the scope   ordered_scope_culture
country|ordered_scope_diplomatic_pact|Any diplomatic pact of the country in a scope   ordered_scope_diplomatic_pact
country,hq|ordered_scope_fleet|Iterate through all fleets currently present at input scope   Supported scopes: country, hq   ordered_scope_fleet
war|ordered_scope_front|Iterate through all Fronts related to the scoped War   ordered_scope_front
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|ordered_scope_general|Iterate through all generals in a: country, interestgroup, front, or military formation   ordered_scope_general
country|ordered_scope_held_interest_marker|Iterate through all interest markers held by a country   ordered_scope_held_interest_marker
country,culture|ordered_scope_homeland_state|Iterate through all states that are a homeland for the scoped culture, or a homeland of any primary culture of the scoped country   ordered_scope_h...
diplomatic_play|ordered_scope_initiator_ally|Iterate through all allies to an initiator in a: diplomatic play   ordered_scope_initiator_ally
country,state_region,strategic_region|ordered_scope_interest_marker|Iterate through all interest markers in a: country, strategic region, state region   ordered_scope_interest_marker
journal_entry|ordered_scope_je_involved|Iterate through all involved in a journal entry   ordered_scope_je_involved
diplomatic_play|ordered_scope_play_involved|Iterate through all involved in a: diplomatic play   ordered_scope_play_involved
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|ordered_scope_politician|Iterate through all politicians in a: country or interestgroup   ordered_scope_politician
country,culture,interest_group,state|ordered_scope_pop|Iterate through all pops in a: country, state, interest group, culture   ordered_scope_pop
company|ordered_scope_regional_hqs|Iterate through regional HQs of the scoped company   ordered_scope_regional_hqs
country,military_formation|ordered_scope_ship|Iterate through all ships in a country or military formation   ordered_scope_ship
country,front,state_region,strait,strategic_region,theater|ordered_scope_state|Iterate through all states including provinces from a: country, state_region, theater, front, or strait   ordered_scope_state
country,state|ordered_scope_strait|Iterate through all straits with a land endpoint in the scoped state or country   ordered_scope_strait
diplomatic_play|ordered_scope_target_ally|Iterate through all allies to a target in a: diplomatic play   ordered_scope_target_ally
country|ordered_scope_theater|Iterate through all theaters in a: country   ordered_scope_theater
country|ordered_scope_treaty|Iterate through in force treaties binding the scoped country   ordered_scope_treaty
country|ordered_scope_violate_sovereignty_interested_parties|Iterate through all countries that would be interested if country in scope has their sovereignty violated   ordered_scope_violate_sovereignty_inter...
country|ordered_scope_violate_sovereignty_wars|Iterate through all relevant wars if target country had their sovereignty violated by scoped country   ordered_scope_violate_sovereignty_wars
country|ordered_scope_war|Iterate through all wars related to the scope   ordered_scope_war
state|ordered_sea_node_adjacent_state|Iterate through all states that share a sea node with a state   ordered_sea_node_adjacent_state
none|ordered_state|Iterate through all states globally   ordered_state

country|ordered_subject_of_subject|Any country below direct subjects in hierarchy   ordered_subject_of_subject
country|ordered_subject_or_below|Any country below current in hierarchy   ordered_subject_or_below
political_movement|ordered_supporting_character|Iterate through all characters that support the scoped political movement   ordered_supporting_character
none|ordered_treaty|Iterate through treaties (both in force and drafts)   ordered_treaty
country|ordered_valid_mass_migration_culture|Lists for cultures in the scoped country that are valid for mass migration   ordered_valid_mass_migration_culture
war|ordered_war_participant|Iterate through all participants in a war   ordered_war_participant
character|place_character_in_void|Banishes a character to the void, duration is how long character is kept before being deleted
country|play_as|Change which country scoped country's player will play as   play_as
none|post_audio_event|Runs an audio even on a "persistent" audio object    post_audio_event
none|post_notification|Posts notification
none|post_proposal|Posts proposal
none|random|run an effect depending on a random chance, do nothing otherwise.
country|random_active_law|Iterate through all active laws in a country   random_active_law
country|random_active_party|Iterate through all active political parties in a country   random_active_party
none|random_character|Iterate through all characters globally   random_character
none|random_character_in_exile_pool|Iterate through characters in the exile pool   random_character_in_exile_pool
none|random_character_in_void|Iterate through characters in the void   random_character_in_void
character|random_character_role|Iterate through all roles of the scoped character   random_character_role
country|random_civil_war|Iterate through all civil wars related to the scoped country   random_civil_war
country|random_cobelligerent_in_diplo_play|Iterate through all co-belligerents of scope country in all diplomatic plays (includes wars)   random_cobelligerent_in_diplo_play
country|random_cobelligerent_in_war|Iterate through all co-belligerents of scope country in all wars   random_cobelligerent_in_war
battle,building,front,hq,military_formation|random_combat_unit|Iterate through all combat units of input scope   Supported scopes: building, military formation, front, battle   random_combat_unit
country|random_company|Iterate through all companies in a country   random_company
none|random_country|Iterate through all countries globally   random_country

country|random_country_strategic_region|Iterate through all strategic regions containing states owned by the scoped country   random_country_strategic_region
none|random_decentralized_country|Iterate through all countries that are decentralized   random_decentralized_country
country|random_diplomatic_catalyst|Iterate through all diplomatic catalysts in the recent memory of a country   random_diplomatic_catalyst
none|random_diplomatic_play|Iterate through all diplomatic plays globally   random_diplomatic_play
country|random_diplomatically_relevant_country|Iterate through all diplomatically relevant countries of a country scope   random_diplomatically_relevant_country
country|random_direct_subject|Any country directly below current in hierarchy   random_direct_subject
country|random_enemy_in_diplo_play|Iterate through all enemies of scope country in all diplomatic plays (includes wars)   random_enemy_in_diplo_play
country|random_enemy_in_war|Iterate through all enemies of scope country in all wars   random_enemy_in_war
country,state,state_region,strategic_region|random_harvest_condition|Iterate through all harvest conditions affecting a state, state region, strategic region, or country   random_harvest_condition
none|random_in_global_list|Iterate through all items in global list.
country|random_in_hierarchy|Any country in current hierarchy, including current   random_in_hierarchy
none|random_in_list|Iterate through all items in list.
none|random_in_local_list|Iterate through all items in local list.
political_movement|random_influenced_interest_group|Iterate through all interest groups influenced by a political movement   random_influenced_interest_group
country|random_interest_group|Iterate through all interest groups in a country   random_interest_group
country|random_law|Iterate through all laws in a country   random_law
none|random_list|Selects one effect from a weighted random list and executes it.
political_lobby|random_lobby_member|Iterate through all interest group members of a lobby   random_lobby_member
none|random_log_scopes|Log the current scope to the random log when this effect executes.
none|random_market|Iterate through all markets globally   random_market
market|random_market_goods|Iterate through all active (market) goods in a market   random_market_goods
party|random_member|Iterate through all interest group members of a party   random_member
country,front,hq|random_military_formation|Iterate through all military formations currently present at input scope   Supported scopes: country, front, hq   random_military_formation
country,state,state_region,strategic_region|random_neighbouring_state|Iterate through all states neighbouring a state region   random_neighbouring_state
country|random_overlord_or_above|Any country above current in hierarchy   random_overlord_or_above
company|random_owned_country|Iterate through all countries owned by the scoped company   random_owned_country
diplomatic_pact|random_participant|Any of two participants of the diplomatic pact in a scope   random_participant
country,interest_group|random_political_lobby|Iterate through all political lobbies in a country or interest group   random_political_lobby
country|random_political_movement|Iterate through all political movements in a country   random_political_movement
law|random_possible_amendment_type|Iterate through amendment types that could be added to the scoped law   random_possible_amendment_type
country|random_potential_party|Iterate through all potential political parties in a country   random_potential_party
none|random_power_bloc|Iterate through all power blocs   random_power_bloc
power_bloc|random_power_bloc_member|Iterate through all members of the scoped power bloc including the leader   random_power_bloc_member
interest_group|random_preferred_law|Iterate through all active and possible laws in an interest group's country, ordered by how much they prefer that law   random_preferred_law
country,country_definition|random_primary_culture|Primary cultures of the scoped country or country definition   random_primary_culture
province|random_province|Iterate through all Provinces in the scoped State   random_province

country|random_rival_country|Any country that is being rivaled by the country in a scope   random_rival_country
country|random_rivaling_country|Any country that is rivaling the country in a scope   random_rivaling_country
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|random_scope_admiral|Iterate through all admirals in a: country, interestgroup, or military formation   random_scope_admiral
country|random_scope_ally|Iterate through all allies to a: country   random_scope_ally
law|random_scope_amendment|Iterate through amendments of the scoped law   random_scope_amendment
country,front,hq|random_scope_army|Iterate through all armies currently present at input scope   Supported scopes: country, front, hq   random_scope_army
treaty|random_scope_article|Iterate through articles of the scoped treaty   random_scope_article
treaty_options,treaty|random_scope_article_option|Iterate through article_options of the scoped treaty or treaty_options   random_scope_article_option
country,state|random_scope_building|Iterate through all buildings in a: state, country   random_scope_building
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|random_scope_character|Iterate through all characters in a: country, interestgroup, or front   random_scope_character
market,state_region,strategic_region|random_scope_country|Iterate through all countries with a presence in the supported scope (currently: market, strategic region)   random_scope_country
country,state|random_scope_culture|Iterate through all cultures in the scope   random_scope_culture
country|random_scope_diplomatic_pact|Any diplomatic pact of the country in a scope   random_scope_diplomatic_pact
country,hq|random_scope_fleet|Iterate through all fleets currently present at input scope   Supported scopes: country, hq   random_scope_fleet
war|random_scope_front|Iterate through all Fronts related to the scoped War   random_scope_front
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|random_scope_general|Iterate through all generals in a: country, interestgroup, front, or military formation   random_scope_general
country|random_scope_held_interest_marker|Iterate through all interest markers held by a country   random_scope_held_interest_marker
country,culture|random_scope_homeland_state|Iterate through all states that are a homeland for the scoped culture, or a homeland of any primary culture of the scoped country   random_scope_ho...
diplomatic_play|random_scope_initiator_ally|Iterate through all allies to an initiator in a: diplomatic play   random_scope_initiator_ally
country,state_region,strategic_region|random_scope_interest_marker|Iterate through all interest markers in a: country, strategic region, state region   random_scope_interest_marker
journal_entry|random_scope_je_involved|Iterate through all involved in a journal entry   random_scope_je_involved
diplomatic_play|random_scope_play_involved|Iterate through all involved in a: diplomatic play   random_scope_play_involved
country,front,interest_group,military_formation|random_scope_politician|Iterate through all politicians in a: country or interestgroup   random_scope_politician
country,culture,interest_group,state|random_scope_pop|Iterate through all pops in a: country, state, interest group, culture   random_scope_pop
company|random_scope_regional_hqs|Iterate through regional HQs of the scoped company   random_scope_regional_hqs
country,military_formation|random_scope_ship|Iterate through all ships in a country or military formation   random_scope_ship
country,front,state_region,strait,strategic_region,theater|random_scope_state|Iterate through all states including provinces from a: country, state_region, theater, front, or strait   random_scope_state
country,state|random_scope_strait|Iterate through all straits with a land endpoint in the scoped state or country   random_scope_strait
diplomatic_play|random_scope_target_ally|Iterate through all allies to a target in a: diplomatic play   random_scope_target_ally
country|random_scope_theater|Iterate through all theaters in a: country   random_scope_theater
country|random_scope_treaty|Iterate through in force treaties binding the scoped country   random_scope_treaty
country|random_scope_violate_sovereignty_interested_parties|Iterate through all countries that would be interested if country in scope has their sovereignty violated   random_scope_violate_sovereignty_intere...
country|random_scope_violate_sovereignty_wars|Iterate through all relevant wars if target country had their sovereignty violated by scoped country   random_scope_violate_sovereignty_wars
country|random_scope_war|Iterate through all wars related to the scope   random_scope_war
state|random_sea_node_adjacent_state|Iterate through all states that share a sea node with a state   random_sea_node_adjacent_state
none|random_state|Iterate through all states globally   random_state
